info.name: World Porra API
info.description: Postman collection for the World Porra REST API. Use Dev Login against local/test scenario databases, or set authToken manually for hosted environments.

item.name: Google Login (real ID token required)
item.description: Requires a real Google ID token issued for the configured GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID. The placeholder value is intentionally invalid; use Dev Login for normal local/staging QA when the API is pointed at a test database.

item.name: Dev Login (recommended for QA)
item.description: Use this first for local/staging QA. It is available only when the API is using a test database or in-memory/test mode, and saves authToken and memberUserId.

item.name: Device Heartbeat
item.description: Upserts the current authenticated user device. Use displayMode=standalone when the app is running as installed PWA, browser for regular web.

item.name: Create League
item.description: Allows any authenticated user to create one league they own/administer. Use KNOCKOUT_ONLY after the normal league-creation lock and before the knockout stage starts.

item.name: My Leagues
item.description: Returns the authenticated user's leagues in their saved order. Master users receive every league, including leagues where they are not a member and should not appear in member lists.

item.name: Update League Order
item.description: Persists the authenticated user's league order. Home uses the first two leagues from this same order.

item.name: Get League (with Leaderboard)
item.description: League detail with sorted leaderboard. Requires membership, except master users can read any league silently without being listed as a member.

item.name: Delete League (Owner/master)
item.description: Deletes a league. Allowed for the league owner or any master user.

item.name: Leave League
item.description: Removes the authenticated user from the league member list. Normal owners cannot leave their own league; master owners can leave to manage the league silently without being visible to players.

item.name: Update Payment Settings (Admin/master)
item.description: Updates payment settings. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user even when the master user is not a member.

item.name: Mark Member Payment (Admin/master)
item.description: Marks a member as paid/unpaid. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user even when the master user is not a member.

item.name: Add League Admin (Admin/master)
item.description: Promotes an existing league member to admin. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user.

item.name: Remove League Admin (Admin/master)
item.description: Removes admin status from a league member. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user. The owner cannot be demoted.

item.name: Notify League Members (Admin/master)
item.description: Sends a notification to league members. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user even when the master user is not a member.

item.name: Remind Unpaid Members (Admin/master)
item.description: Sends payment reminders to unpaid league members. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user.

item.name: Preview Missing Pick Reminder (Admin/master)
item.description: Previews members missing picks for matches locking soon. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user.

item.name: Send Missing Pick Reminder (Admin/master)
item.description: Sends reminders to members missing picks for matches locking soon. Allowed for league admins, the owner, or any master user.

item.name: Get Member Predictions
item.description: Returns a league member's finished predictions and upcoming pick status. Requires membership, except master users can read any league member silently.

item.name: Create Contact Message
item.description: Any authenticated user can send a private message to master users. The test script stores the created message id as contactMessageId.

item.name: List My Contact Threads
item.description: Returns the authenticated user's own contact threads, including replies from master users.

item.name: Reply to Contact Thread
item.description: Adds a reply to a contact thread. The original sender or any master user can reply.

item.name: List Contact Messages (Master only)
item.description: Requires a normal bearer auth token for a master user. Optional status filter accepts new, read, or resolved.

item.name: Update Contact Message Status (Master only)
item.description: Marks a contact message as new, read, or resolved.

item.name: List Users (Master only)
item.description: Requires a normal bearer auth token for a master user. Optional search filters by name or email. The test script stores the first returned user as adminUserId.

item.name: Get User Detail (Master only)
item.description: Shows one user's email/profile details, enrolled leagues, prediction completion status, finished-match picks with points, and group ordering only after the group stage is complete.

item.name: Set Manual Match Result (Master only)
item.description: Manually set a match result and immediately re-score predictions. Use when the data feed lags or returns a finished match with no score. Sets status=FINISHED and flags the match as manualResult so the periodic sync won't overwrite it. `winner` is optional and is derived from the scoreline; provide it only for a knockout tie decided on penalties, where the advancing side can't be inferred from the goals.
